summary: Register the hand-built transcendence layer (advise, compare, advise-replay, cost-trace, budget) in the generated entrypoints root.go and which.go.
reason: The advisor package (internal/advisor/*) and its five novel commands are hand-authored beyond the generator's endpoint mirror (tracked in .printing-press.json novel_features). The only edits to generator-owned files are the AddCommand registrations in root.go and the curated whichIndex entries in which.go that wire those novel commands into the CLI.
validated_outcome: go build ./... ; ollama-cloud-pp-cli advise/compare/advise-replay/budget/cost-trace --help all resolve; cli-printing-press verify-skill --dir . passes
